activated_rules.rule_name: Koncernstruktur - consignor match in invoice text

consignor.motivation: Consignor '4Intelligence AB' from certificate matches invoice issuer '4Intelligence AB' exactly after normalization including juridical form abbreviation and address. The company name and country Sweden align perfectly. The consignor name appears in the invoice header and address block with consistent address. Hence, rule 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.6 validate a MATCH.

consignee.motivation: Consignee in certificate matches the invoice 'SHIP TO' party with identical company name and matching address details after normalization (e.g. 'Hà Nội' vs 'Hanoi', 'Viet Nam' vs 'VIETNAM'). The consignee is found in the 'Ship To' field of the invoice, consistent with allowed consignee fields. Land is consistent. Therefore, verification rules 4.2.0.1 and 4.2.2.1 confirm MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Model: INT-V005-A-MAXIMUM
Secret Video Recorder, serial no: 986519
Manufacturer: 4Intelligence AB
Year of manufacture: 2025
goods_description.invoice_value:
VIDEO RECORDER
Model: INT-V005-A-MAXIMUM
Including accessories according to contract no 1212-IN-SEC/2024
Manufacturer: 4Intelligence AB
Origin: Sweden
Serial no: 986519
HS code: 8919810090 - Y901
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate 'Model: INT-V005-A-MAXIMUM, Secret Video Recorder, serial no: 986519' matches invoice line with 'VIDEO RECORDER, Model: INT-V005-A-MAXIMUM, Manufacturer: 4Intelligence AB, Serial no: 986519'. The article description matches exactly and serial number confirms identity. Hence rule 4.3.2 priority 2 validation yields MATCH.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in certificate '01 Set' corresponds to invoice quantity '1'. Allowed normalization accepts numeral forms with or without leading zero and matching unit 'Set'. No conflicting quantity found in invoice. Rule 4.4.3 confirms direct identifcation of numeric quantity resulting in MATCH.

origin.motivation: Origin 'Sweden' in certificate exactly matches the declared 'Origin: Sweden' in invoice. EU-normalization supports match between 'European Union' and specific member state Sweden. Rule 4.5.4.1 and 4.6 confirm MATCH without conflict.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla tillämpliga kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) verifieras som MATCH utan några motsägelser eller osäkerheter. Dokumenten är konsekventa och kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter mellan certifikatet och fakturan stämmer väl överens och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
